title: TikTok says AI-generated spam ‘crowds out original creators’ — so it’s teaching users how to spot AI
summary: Even TikTok , which has spent the last couple of years rolling out AI creation tools, is now testing new ways to detect AI-generated spam and teaching users how to recognize AI content.
caption: output/2026-07-22/tiktok-says-ai-generated-spam-crowds-out-original-creators-so-it-s-tea.txt
